# XCUIScreen

**Class**

A physical screen attached to a device.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor class XCUIScreen
```

## Overview

Call the [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIScreenshotProviding/screenshot()] method on an [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIScreen] instance to capture a screenshot of its current UI state. The [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIScreenshotProviding] protocol adds this method to [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIScreen].

You can take a screenshot of the current device’s main screen using the following code:

```swift
let screenshot = XCUIScreen.main.screenshot()
```

You can take a screenshot of every screen on the current device using the following code:

```swift
let allScreenshots = XCUIScreen.screens.map { screen in
    return screen.screenshot()
}
```

## Device screens

- **main**: The current device’s main screen.
- **screens**: The current device’s active screens.

## Screenshots

- **XCUIScreenshot**: A captured image of a screen, app, or UI element state.
- **XCUIScreenshotProviding**: A type that can provide a screenshot of its current UI state.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
- Sendable
- XCUIScreenshotProviding
